title: ROAST — From Bean to Cup
special: HORIZONTAL STORY: vertical scroll drives a pinned horizontal track through 5 cinematic chapters (origin → harvest → roast → brew → cup), with a progress rail + chapter dots. Stays scroll-driven on mobile (touch). Reduced-motion → vertical stack.
summary: A single-origin coffee brand story told as a horizontal scroll journey: vertical scrolling slides five full-screen chapters sideways from hillside to cup, then a shop section.
summary_vi: Câu chuyện thương hiệu cà phê single-origin kể bằng cuộn ngang: cuộn dọc làm năm chương toàn màn hình trôi ngang từ đồi đến ly, rồi khu mua hàng.
